summary: Comprehensive testing of new features for ETI Educom Lead Management System. All backend APIs passing (31 passed, 1 skipped). Frontend UI tests verified for Dashboard financial charts, Branch-wise Financial Summary, Marketing Resources page, and Enrollments page with payment status display and receipt generation.

minor.issue: Old payments created before feature update don't have branch_id and receipt_number fields - this is expected migration behavior, not a bug

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console for table elements (span inside tbody) - cosmetic warning only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly and functioning properly
Payment model correctly includes branch_id (from enrollment) and receipt_number (auto-generated RCP-XXXX format)
Receipt API returns complete data including institute header, branch info, and all payment details
Monthly financial analytics correctly aggregates income from payments and expenses by month
Branch-wise financial summary correctly calculates total income, expenses, and net profit per branch
Marketing Resources CRUD implemented with proper role-based access (Admin can create/delete, all users can view)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed marketing resources (Brochure, Creative, Video, Document) created during testing. Additional test payments created for verifying branch_id and receipt_number fields.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working. Krishna Mahajan is the enrolled student with partial payment status (₹25,100 of ₹28,800). Dashboard shows financial analytics with year selector for 2026. Marketing Resources page has 4+ resources created from tests. MSG91 WhatsApp API is MOCKED (returns success but doesn't actually send messages).

mocked_apis.MSG91 WhatsApp API: send_whatsapp_message function returns success but does not actually send messages - MOCKED

features_verified.Payment with branch_id and receipt_numbe: WORKING - New payments correctly include branch_id from enrollment and auto-generated receipt_number (RCP-XXXX format)
features_verified.Receipt generation API: WORKING - /api/payments/{payment_id}/receipt returns complete receipt data including institute name, tagline, branch info, student details, and amount
features_verified.Printable receipt dialog: WORKING - Receipt dialog appears after recording payment with Print Receipt button using window.print()
features_verified.Enrolled students with payment status: WORKING - Table shows Student, Contact, Program, Final Fee, Payment Status (Paid/Partial/Pending with paid amount display)
features_verified.Dashboard Monthly Income & Expenses char: WORKING - Bar chart with Income (green) and Expenses (red) bars, year selector, Total Income/Expenses/Net Profit summary cards
features_verified.Admin Dashboard Branch-wise Financial Su: WORKING - Table showing Branch, Enrollments, Total Income, Total Expenses, Net Profit for each branch
features_verified.Marketing Resources page: WORKING - Shows resources as cards with icons, tabs for filtering (All/Brochure/Creative/Video/Document)
features_verified.Admin create marketing resources: WORKING - Add Resource button opens dialog with Title, Description, Resource Type selector, File URL/Video Link fields
features_verified.All users view marketing resources: WORKING - Resources visible to all logged-in users
features_verified.Resources navigation in sidebar: WORKING - Resources link visible in sidebar for all user roles
